image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: What if your body had a memory that could save your life?
Context visual: After an infection or vaccine, your immune system creates memory cells.
Escalation visual: These cells, like vigilant guards, remember past invaders.
Evidence visual: Memory B cells churn out antibodies, while memory T cells seek and destroy.
Payoff visual: Together, they create a powerful defense, ready for the next attack.
Pattern Interrupt visual: Wondering how long this memory lasts? Months, years, even a lifetime!
Cta visual: Curious about your immune system? Like and follow for more science secrets!
